transcript: Robot: Hello, what is your name? Rahul: My name is Rahul. Robot: How old are you? Rahul: I have 22. Robot: I have 22 nahi, I am 22 yrs old hota hai. [Not 'I have 22', it is 'I am 22 yrs old'.] Rahul: Okay okay, I am 22 years old. Robot: Where are you from? Rahul: I am Uttar Pradesh. Robot: I am Uttar Pradesh nahi, I am from Uttar Pradesh hoga. [Not 'I am Uttar Pradesh', it will be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.] Rahul: Oh, theek hai theek hai. Mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Oh, okay okay. I don't know English very well.] Robot: Koi problem nahi. AI teachers try kiya? [No problem. Did you try AI teachers?] Rahul: Wo to mehnge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?] Robot: Bilkul nahi. Normal English classes se 7x cheaper hai. Isliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all. It is 7x cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.] Rahul: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] Robot: Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaoge. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Rahul: Wow, kaise join karun? [Wow, how do I join?] Robot: Ye install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sirf 15 dino mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo, shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started.] Voiceover: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Hello, What is your name?, My name is Rahul, How old are you, I have 22, I am 22 yrs old, Where are you from, I am Uttar Pradesh, I am from Uttar Pradesh, Mujhe English [My English], Koi problem nahi [No problem], AI teachers try kiya [Did you try AI teachers], Wo to mehnge [They must be expensive], 7X CHEAPER, MySivi AI English Speaking..., Install, 5M+ Downloads, Par time nahi [But no time], Roz ki sirf 15-20 [Just 15-20 daily], Bilkul confident [Completely confident], Kaise join karun [How do I join], Install, Sirf 15 dino mein [In just 15 days], dikhne lagegi [will start showing], MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: A young man with 'ME NO ENGLISH' written on his back gets his English grammar corrected by an AI robot. The robot explains that the MySivi app is 7x cheaper than traditional classes and requires only 15-20 minutes of daily practice. The ad ends with a call to action to install the MySivi app for visible improvement in 15 days.
